name: Bryany County Venison
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds venison, cut into 1 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until tender.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, salt, thyme, bay leaf, and black pepper.
3. Coat the venison cubes in the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Add the venison to the skillet and brown over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes on each side.
5. Sprinkle the beef bouillon over the meat and add wine. Stir to combine, then reduce the heat to low.
6. Cook at a simmer for one hour, stirring occasionally. If needed, add more wine or bouillon to achieve desired consistency.
7. In another skillet, melt butter and sauté the mushrooms until they release their moisture and become tender.
8. Add the cooked mushroom mixture to the skillet with the venison and continue to cook for about 30 minutes, or until the meat is fully tender.
9. Serve hot over potatoes, rice, or noodles.
